abilities.description: A weak melee attack. If this kills anything, you become the Alpha. If you are the Alpha, this spell deals 5 additional damage and inflicts Bruise.Upgraded: A weak melee attack. If this kills anything, you become the Alpha and gain +2 Strength. If you are the Alpha, this spell deals 5 additional damage and inflicts Bruise.

abilities.description: Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your Strength. Reduce this spell's mana cost by 1 each time you take damage. (Castable once per turn.) Upgraded: Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your Strength. Reduce this spell's mana cost by 2 each time you take damage. (Castable once per turn.)

translation.ru_description:
Урон, отбрасывание и урон от толчка равны [img:str].
Цена падает на 1 каждый раз, когда вас бьют.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]

Урон, отбрасывание и урон от толчка равны [img:str].
Цена падает на 2 каждый раз, когда вас бьют.
[s:.7](Раз за ход.)[/s]
translation.en_description:
Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your [img:str].
Reduce this spell's mana cost by 1 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
translation.en_upgraded_description:
Deal damage, knockback, and knockback damage equal to your [img:str].
Reduce this spell's mana cost by 2 each time you take damage.
[s:.7](Castable once per turn.)[/s]
